one_time_description: Indigenous Services Canada funding increased significantly from $3,415,299 to $12,790,340 - likely includes COVID-19 related funding or settlement amounts
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include NDC LP, Myguard Security Group LP, Onikaajigan Construction LP, Anokiigamig Construction LP, Ozaanaman Engineering LP, and Kish Gon Dug (Canada) Inc. Naicatchewenin Development Corporation is fully consolidated as a subsidiary.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to NDC LP (government business enterprise) recording equity investments at cost rather than fair value as required by IFRS under Canadian public sector accounting standards. Fair value adjustments could not be determined. ISC funding jumped from $3.4M to $12.8M year-over-year - likely COVID-19 related. Restricted cash of $10,157,945 includes replacement reserves ($245,250) and funding agreements ($9,450,302) plus internally restricted capital replacement reserves ($115,093) and heritage/education funds ($147,300). Housing expenses split between band housing ($122,056) and CMHC rental housing ($306,138). Expenses_housing is sum of both.
